title: Wedding Bouquets dusky blue Brides Posy Bridesmaids wands
description: Artificial Wedding Flowers Package Dusky blue These stunning artificial wedding bouquets and accessories are made with ivory and blue roses with gypsophila . They are perfectly finished with added leaves & satin ribbon on the handle . Available in 3 different sizes with matching buttonholes, wands, wrist corsages and hair combs. Sizes are approximately Bride Teardrop – 15.5″ long by 9.5″ wide Large Bridesmaid’s Posy – 8″ by 8″ Small child, bridesmaid Posy 6″ by 6″ Table Decoration – 8″ by 8″ Candle Ring Table Decoration – 8″ by 8″ Large Top Table decoration – 20″ long 10.5″ wide Wrist teddy – 3″ long 2.5″ wide Cake sizes Top piece 5.5 inches wide 3.5 inches tall Side piece 7.5 inches long 4.5 inches wide
